response.justification: While Szabo brings 19 years of software engineering experience and technical breadth across multiple domains, this Principal Engineer role is fundamentally about AI strategy and leadership, requiring recognized AI/ML expertise with demonstrated products. The candidate's recent work at re:cinq (6 months) mentions AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks any evidence of deep AI/ML knowledge, shipped AI-powered platforms, or the strategic organizational impact expected at director level. The absence of an advanced degree in AI and no portfolio of AI products is a critical gap for this specialized role.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 19 years spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Demonstrates thought leadership through founding GISCollective, publishing open-source libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and delivering conference talks and workshops
Shows technical adaptability across diverse technology stacks including cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and multiple programming languages
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI-powered products despite role's emphasis on 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products'
Lacks advanced degree in AI-related field (Master's/PhD) which is explicitly preferred for a director-level AI strategy position
Career history shows broad technical skills but limited evidence of director-level strategic impact or influence on organizational AI/cloud direction

key_factors.factor: Lack of advanced degree in AI
